description_long: This is a polygonal, tapered cup with an octagonal rim and a wide opening, narrowing towards the base. The exterior is predominantly red and features a repeating 'GG' logo in white and black, with one side displaying a larger, bold 'GG' graphic. The rim is slightly flared and colored in a lighter shade, possibly white or light gray, providing a visual contrast to the main body. The cup appears to be made of a lightweight material, likely plastic or coated paper, suitable for disposable or casual use. The interior is plain and light-colored, with no visible handle or lid. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, making it suitable for urban environments such as cafes, food trucks, or street events.
description: A red, octagonal cup with a wide opening, decorated with repeating 'GG' logos and a bold graphic. The cup has a flared light-colored rim and no handle or lid.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large, bold 'GG' logo prominently on the red surface, with smaller 'GG' logos scattered around.
description_view_1: This view displays the plain red side with only the repeating smaller 'GG' logos and no large central graphic.
description_view_2: Similar to view 1, this side features the repeating 'GG' logos on a red background, with no large logo visible.
description_view_3: This view shows the edge of the large 'GG' logo partially visible on the right, with the rest of the surface covered in smaller 'GG' logos.
